title: senecio sociorum
intro: Senecio sociorum, also known as Woolly Ragwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Senecio sociorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to address various health concerns, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional due to potential toxicity.
